name: dockerfile-cargo-free-regression
description: Add static regression tests and pre-commit hooks to assert a forbidden shell pattern (e.g. cargo install, apt dependency) is absent from Dockerfiles. Use when: (1) a dependency has been removed from Dockerfiles and you want to prevent re-introduction, (2) adding absent-pattern guards to Dockerfiles as pygrep hooks, (3) writing parametrized pytest tests that scan Dockerfile content for forbidden strings.
